Class CombatZone

java.lang.Object
Model.Board.AdventureCards.AdventureCardFilip
Model.Board.AdventureCards.CombatZone
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable, Iterable<CombatZoneLine>
public class CombatZone extends AdventureCardFilip implements Iterable<CombatZoneLine>
Represents the combat zone in the game, which consists of multiple lines of combat criteria and penalties. This class implements Iterable to allow iteration over the combat lines.
See Also:

    • CombatZone

      public CombatZone(com.google.gson.JsonObject json)
      Constructs a CombatZone from a JSON representation. The JSON contains an array of lines, each with a criteria and a penalty.
